series_metadata.series_description: These forms are used by pharmacies to report lost or stolen controlled substances as required by the DEA. Pharmacies are required to submit the Ohio Pharmacy Board a copy so our Agents can investigate loss patterns and/or diversions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: Scan or retain on site for 2 years and offsite for 3 years ; Electronic: Electronic: retain on server for 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
